readings.Aries: There is a version of this situation that doesn't require you to fight. Try to find it. There's more support available than you've asked for.
readings.Taurus: Your body knows something your mind is still processing. Listen to it today. What worked before will not work the same way this time.
readings.Gemini: You're very good at making things feel lighter. Someone around you needs weight acknowledged, not lifted. The first instinct was right.
readings.Cancer: You have been protecting others from your feelings. Consider the cost of that protection. Someone you haven't thought of lately is relevant to this.
readings.Leo: Something you dismissed as vanity is actually self-knowledge. Let yourself have it. Small, deliberate, and patient — that's the mode today.
readings.Virgo: Someone around you needs your discernment, not your discretion. Share what you see. The week ahead rewards preparation you can still do today.
readings.Libra: Your instinct for what looks and feels right is calibrated finely. Trust it on the bigger questions too. Make contact with the actual person rather than the version in your head.
readings.Scorpio: You contain multitudes of darkness and light and you've learned not to be afraid of either. Teach someone. Trust the slow version of this over the fast one.
readings.Sagittarius: Your honesty is a gift. Right now it needs better packaging. Notice what hasn't changed, not just what has.
readings.Capricorn: Something you've been deferring — pleasure, connection, play — has been deferred long enough. Something you've been measuring incorrectly just corrected itself.
readings.Aquarius: Your version of intimacy is unusual and real. Someone is trying to understand it. Help them. Go back to the original intention — it's still the right one.
readings.Pisces: You've been in someone else's current for a while. Find your own direction. This situation responds well to direct engagement.

Aries-Aries.synthesis: The competition is never stated and never absent. You perform for each other even when you don't mean to.

Aries-Taurus.synthesis: Your natural speeds are different. Finding the pace that doesn't frustrate either of you is the whole project.

Aries-Gemini.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Cancer.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Aries-Leo.synthesis: You give each other permission to be more yourselves. Sometimes that permission is exactly the problem.

Aries-Virgo.synthesis: The slow materials and the fast energy can build something neither could alone. Patience is required from the fire.

Aries-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Scorpio.synthesis: You challenge each other's default mode — which is either exactly what you needed or what you weren't ready for.

Aries-Sagittarius.synthesis: You recognised each other immediately. Whether that's good news depends entirely on what you recognised.

Aries-Capricorn.synthesis: The heat is useful when the earth channels it. The earth is useful when the fire can wait long enough.

Aries-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Pisces.synthesis: The heat and the depth exist in real tension. That tension is the most honest thing between you.

Taurus-Taurus.synthesis: The practical language between you is fluent and efficient. The emotional one takes more effort from both.

Taurus-Gemini.synthesis: The friction between you is productive until the day one of you decides it isn't worth it. Don't let it go that long.

Taurus-Cancer.synthesis: This tends to become quietly necessary to both people before either admits it.

Taurus-Leo.synthesis: There's something genuinely generative in the friction. Whether either of you can tolerate friction is the question.

Taurus-Virgo.synthesis: You recognise each other's methods. Whether that familiarity breeds trust or contempt is up to you.

Taurus-Libra.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Taurus-Scorpio.synthesis: The stability and the depth work well together — until they work too well and nobody grows.

Taurus-Sagittarius.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Taurus-Capricorn.synthesis: You anchor each other well. Make sure neither of you has quietly agreed to stop moving entirely.

Taurus-Aquarius.synthesis: The ideas need grounding. The ground needs ideas. Neither of you finds this as obvious as it sounds.

Taurus-Pisces.synthesis: You offer each other what you each struggle most to give yourself: one of you offers ground, one of you offers feeling.

Gemini-Gemini.synthesis: You make each other sharper. You also make each other better at avoiding the things words can't fix.

Gemini-Cancer.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Gemini-Leo.synthesis: You're both good at starting things. One of you will have to become better at finishing them.

Gemini-Virgo.synthesis: The friction between you is productive until the day one of you decides it isn't worth it. Don't let it go that long.

Gemini-Libra.synthesis: The conversation never stops. Decide if what you're talking around is more interesting than what you'd find if you arrived.

Gemini-Scorpio.synthesis: You each feel slightly alien to the other. That's either the draw or the obstacle. Often both.

Gemini-Sagittarius.synthesis: You're both good at starting things. One of you will have to become better at finishing them.

Gemini-Capricorn.synthesis: The friction between you is productive until the day one of you decides it isn't worth it. Don't let it go that long.

Gemini-Aquarius.synthesis: You're rarely bored together. Occasionally you're frustrated by the inability to just be still.

Gemini-Pisces.synthesis: The emotional and the intellectual are in conversation here. When it works, it's singular. When it doesn't, it's lonely.

Cancer-Cancer.synthesis: You absorb each other's moods completely. Make sure the current is flowing in a direction you chose.

Cancer-Leo.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Cancer-Virgo.synthesis: The foundation feels natural because it is. What gets built on top of it requires more deliberate attention.

Cancer-Libra.synthesis: The emotional and the intellectual are in conversation here. When it works, it's singular. When it doesn't, it's lonely.

Cancer-Scorpio.synthesis: The bond forms quietly and completely. What you've bonded over — desire, or need — is worth knowing.

Cancer-Sagittarius.synthesis: The heat and the depth exist in real tension. That tension is the most honest thing between you.

Cancer-Capricorn.synthesis: You move at similar speeds, value similar things. That similarity is either comfort or camouflage.

Cancer-Aquarius.synthesis: The emotional and the intellectual are in conversation here. When it works, it's singular. When it doesn't, it's lonely.

Cancer-Pisces.synthesis: Nobody outside this pairing fully understands what happens inside it. That's exactly how you want it.

Leo-Leo.synthesis: The competition is never stated and never absent. You perform for each other even when you don't mean to.

Leo-Virgo.synthesis: Something transformative is possible here — if neither of you insists on doing it alone.

Leo-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Scorpio.synthesis: The heat and the depth exist in real tension. That tension is the most honest thing between you.

Leo-Sagittarius.synthesis: There is enough heat between you to forge something remarkable or burn it all down. Usually both.

Leo-Capricorn.synthesis: One of you wants to move before it's ready. One of you wants to wait until it's certain. Neither will be satisfied.

Leo-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Pisces.synthesis: The attraction was always obvious. The sustainability is the question neither of you has fully answered.

Virgo-Virgo.synthesis: You build things that last. The slower the construction, the less you talk about what might be missing.

Virgo-Libra.synthesis: Your different relationships with time are either the most useful thing about this or the most exhausting.

Virgo-Scorpio.synthesis: You move at similar speeds, value similar things. That similarity is either comfort or camouflage.

Virgo-Sagittarius.synthesis: You work well when one agrees to be the foundation and the other agrees to be the spark. Agreement is the hard part.

Virgo-Capricorn.synthesis: You build things that last. The slower the construction, the less you talk about what might be missing.

Virgo-Aquarius.synthesis: You each think the other is slightly impractical, and you're both right about each other, and wrong.

Virgo-Pisces.synthesis: The foundation feels natural because it is. What gets built on top of it requires more deliberate attention.

Libra-Libra.synthesis: You make each other sharper. You also make each other better at avoiding the things words can't fix.

Libra-Scorpio.synthesis: The mismatch in how you process things is a feature in good times and a fault line in bad ones.

Libra-Sagittarius.synthesis: The energy is contagious. People feel it from the outside. Make sure you both still feel it from the inside.

Libra-Capricorn.synthesis: You each think the other is slightly impractical, and you're both right about each other, and wrong.

Libra-Aquarius.synthesis: The ideas between you breed more ideas. At some point one of them needs to become something real.

Libra-Pisces.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Scorpio-Scorpio.synthesis: The depth here is real and a little unnerving to both of you.

Scorpio-Sagittarius.synthesis: The intensity is real. Whether it's connection or pressure depends on which day you're asking.

Scorpio-Capricorn.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Scorpio-Aquarius.synthesis: You each feel slightly alien to the other. That's either the draw or the obstacle. Often both.

Scorpio-Pisces.synthesis: You both know how to hold pain without speaking. Decide if that's strength or evasion.

Sagittarius-Sagittarius.synthesis: There is enough heat between you to forge something remarkable or burn it all down. Usually both.

Sagittarius-Capricorn.synthesis: You work well when one agrees to be the foundation and the other agrees to be the spark. Agreement is the hard part.

Sagittarius-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Sagittarius-Pisces.synthesis: The intensity is real. Whether it's connection or pressure depends on which day you're asking.

Capricorn-Capricorn.synthesis: You recognise each other's methods. Whether that familiarity breeds trust or contempt is up to you.

Capricorn-Aquarius.synthesis: You each think the other is slightly impractical, and you're both right about each other, and wrong.

Capricorn-Pisces.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Aquarius-Aquarius.synthesis: You both live a little inside your heads. When you're together, the heads get very crowded.

Aquarius-Pisces.synthesis: You're both drawn to what the other has access to. Whether you can access it in each other is the question.

Pisces-Pisces.synthesis: You see each other clearly enough to hurt each other precisely. That's not a warning. It's just the truth.

calculation_methods: Planetary longitudes: Jean Meeus 'Astronomical Algorithms' low-precision formulae (±1° accuracy)
Retrograde: computed from direction of longitude change vs previous day
Aspects: angular separation with standard orbs (conjunction 8°, sextile 6°, square/trine/opposition 8°, quincunx 3°)
Compatibility: element harmony base score + modality adjustment + date-seeded variance
Daily readings: deterministic date-seed (PRNG) selects from 60-entry per-sign pools + 30-entry suffix pool; 1,800 combinations per sign
